pr.title: Record: Fused Triton MLP + Full GPTQ + Coprime Loader + XSA-all + BH2816 (val_bpb 1.1116)

output.summary: Fuses Triton leaky_relu² MLP, full Hessian GPTQ, coprime-stride loader, XSA on every layer, and enlarged bigram hash under fullgraph compile.
techniques: Custom Triton kernel fusing leaky_relu(x,0.5)² per MLP layer
Full Hessian GPTQ with Cholesky, actorder permutation, and multi-way clip sweep
Coprime-stride data loader plus XSA everywhere and bigger BigramHash features
